lootSources.name: Erkul page scan
lootSources.description: Supplementary scan of Erkul public pages for items, shops, and location references.

_rawPages.excerpt: #DPSCalculator "Deploy-time edge cache poisoning", 2026-07-15). If a build asset fails to load — classically the browser cached the SPA-fallback HTML under a hashed .js/.css URL during a deploy's propagation window, immutable for a year — `nosniff` guarantees an error event on the tag. Re-fetch the exact URL with `cache: 'reload'` (replaces the poisoned HTTP-cache entry), then reload once. The sessionStorage stamp caps recovery at one attempt per minute so a still-propagating deploy can't reload-loop the tab. Inline because when main-*.js is the poisoned asset, no bundle code ever runs — this is the only place that can heal it. --> /description/OG), and the client ErkulTitleStrategy keeps them live after JS boots. If the function ever doesn't run (local dev), these stay valid. -->
